calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day set for Short Cause Trial sent forthwith from Department 501.

Dept.505: Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Tan; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957; commencing at 9:11:45 a.m. and concluding at 9:20:54 a.m.(D505)

Julia Adams, Esq. representing Plaintiff 100 Van Ness Associates, LLC.
Defendant Martin Greenberg not appearing.
Jonathan Duong sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.
Darryl Williams sworn to testify for Plaintiff.

Plaintiff complaint for Unlawful Detainer filed Nov-08-2023.
Amended Answer by Defendant filed Dec-06-2023.
Proof of substituted service of summons and complaint as to Defendant Martin Greenberg served Nov-11-2023; service effectuated on Nov-20-2023.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial and settlement hearing mailed and filed by the Court on Mar-21-2024.

Counsel summarizes the content of the compliant and offers proof as to witness testimony.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2: Notice to pay or quit.
Exhibit 3: Notice to pay or quit.

Jonathan Duong is called to testify.
The Clerk administers the Witness oath to Jonathan Duong.
Jonathan Duong confirms that Counsel's statements are true and correct.

Darryl Williams is called to testify.
The Clerk administers the Witness oath to Darryl Williams.
Darryl Williams confirms that Counsel's statements are true and correct.

After reviewing the evidence, declarations and hearing the testimonies, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Past Due Rent $25,300.00
Holdover Damages $13,338.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $741.00

Total Judgment $39,379.00

Plaintiff is entitled to the premises located at 100 Van Ness Avenue, #309, San Francisco, County of San Francisco CA, 94102.

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

Parties stipulate to the return of the exhibits.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Assigned To Trial Court
